name: crawl
title: Crawl
description: A maze crawling strategy game with fog of war. Two players navigate an infinite northward-scrolling maze, building robots to explore, collect energy, and outlast the opponent.

action.description: Actions keyed by robot UID. Values are action strings: NORTH, SOUTH, EAST, WEST, BUILD_SCOUT, BUILD_WORKER, BUILD_MINER, EXPLODE_NORTH, EXPLODE_EAST, EXPLODE_SOUTH, EXPLODE_WEST, PETRIFY, TRANSFORM, TRANSFER_NORTH, TRANSFER_EAST, TRANSFER_SOUTH, TRANSFER_WEST, JUMP_NORTH, JUMP_EAST, JUMP_SOUTH, JUMP_WEST, IDLE.

episodeSteps.description: Maximum number of steps in the episode.

actTimeout.description: Maximum runtime (seconds) to obtain an action from an agent.

runTimeout.description: Maximum runtime (seconds) of an episode (not necessarily DONE).

width.description: Width of the maze in cells.

height.description: Height of the visible window in cells.

randomSeed.description: Seed for the random number generator.

scoutCost.description: Energy cost to build a scout.

workerCost.description: Energy cost to build a worker.

minerCost.description: Energy cost to build a miner.

scoutMaxEnergy.description: Maximum energy a scout can carry.

workerMaxEnergy.description: Maximum energy a worker can carry.

minerMaxEnergy.description: Maximum energy a miner can carry.

explodeCost.description: Energy required for a worker to explode and remove a wall.

petrifyCost.description: Energy required for a worker to petrify into a terrain block.

transformCost.description: Energy required for a miner to transform into a mine.

mineMaxEnergy.description: Maximum energy a mine can store.

mineRate.description: Energy generated per mine per turn.

energyPerTurn.description: Energy consumed per robot per turn.

factoryMovePeriod.description: Factory can move every N turns.

workerMovePeriod.description: Worker can move every N turns.

minerMovePeriod.description: Miner can move every N turns.

scrollStartInterval.description: Turns between scroll advances at the start of the game.

scrollEndInterval.description: Turns between scroll advances at max speed.

scrollRampSteps.description: Step at which scroll speed reaches maximum.

crystalDensity.description: Probability of a crystal per cell when generating new rows.

doorProbability.description: Probability of a door between the two maze halves per row.

remainingOverageTime.description: Total remaining banked time (seconds) that can be used in excess of per-step actTimeouts -- agent is disqualified with TIMEOUT status when this drops below 0.

player.description: The current agent's player index (0 or 1).

walls.description: Flat array of wall bitfields for discovered cells. Index = (row - southBound) * width + col. -1 = undiscovered. 16 = petrified.

crystals.description: Visible crystals: keys are 'col,row', values are energy amounts.

robots.description: Visible robots: keys are uid strings, values are [type, col, row, energy, owner, move_cooldown, jump_cooldown].

mines.description: Discovered mines: keys are 'col,row', values are [energy, maxEnergy, owner].

southBound.description: Current southern boundary row of the active zone.

northBound.description: Current northern boundary row of the active zone.

globalWalls.description: Complete wall data for all rows. Keys are row numbers, values are wall bitfield arrays.

globalCrystals.description: All crystals. Keys are 'col,row', values are energy amounts.

globalRobots.description: All robots. Keys are uid strings, values are [type, col, row, energy, owner, move_cooldown, jump_cooldown].

globalMines.description: All mines. Keys are 'col,row', values are [energy, maxEnergy, owner, rate].

discoveredCells.description: Per-player set of discovered cell keys. Hidden from agents.

discoveredMines.description: Per-player set of discovered mine keys. Hidden from agents.

reward.description: Total energy across all robots if alive, else step_eliminated - episodeSteps - 1.
